# AgentCanary — The Record
# https://agentcanary.ai

## What This Site Is
AgentCanary is a macro market intelligence platform that publishes
4 daily briefs tracking regime states, whale alerts, narrative scores,
and macro signals across crypto, equities, commodities, and forex.
"The Record" is our scored daily archive — every call is tracked
and evaluated against actual market outcomes.

## Data Available
- Daily market intelligence briefs (4 per day: morning, midday, signal, evening)
- Regime state tracking (stagflation, late-cycle, recession, expansion, displacement, neutral)
- Regime gauge score (0–100 continuous)
- Whale alert signals (on-chain large transactions)
- Narrative lifecycle scores (birth → peak → fade, scored 0.0–1.0)
- Scorecard accuracy data (hindsight evaluation of all calls, 48–72hr delay)
- Key asset prices (BTC, SPX, WTI, VIX, DXY, Gold)

## Structured Data Locations
- Homepage: JSON-LD with Organization, WebSite, DataCatalog schemas
- Daily pages: JSON-LD with Article + MarketIntelligence custom schema
- JSON Feed: https://agentcanary.ai/record/feed.json (JSON Feed 1.1)
- RSS Feed: https://agentcanary.ai/record/rss.xml (RSS 2.0)
- Sitemap: https://agentcanary.ai/sitemap.xml

## URL Patterns
- Daily intel: /record/YYYY/MM/DD (e.g., /record/2026/03/14)
- Monthly rollup: /record/YYYY/MM/ (e.g., /record/2026/03/)
- Archive: /record/archive
- API docs: /api/docs

## API Access
- Base URL: https://api.agentcanary.ai/v1
- OpenAPI spec: https://agentcanary.ai/api/openapi.json
- Authentication: API key via header (X-API-Key)
- Free tier: 7-day lookback, 10 calls/day
- Pro tier ($49/mo): Full history, 1000 calls/day
- Team tier ($199/mo): Bulk export, custom alerts, chat layer

## Key Endpoints
- GET /v1/record/{date} — Full day payload (all briefs, regime, signals, scores)
- GET /v1/regime/history?range=30d — Regime state time series
- GET /v1/signals?type=whale&range=7d — Signal query with filters
- GET /v1/scorecard/{date} — Accuracy data for a specific day
- GET /v1/narratives?active=true — Currently active narrative scores

## Data Schema (Brief Object)
Each daily page and API response contains structured brief objects:
- date: ISO 8601 date string
- session: morning | midday | signal | evening
- regime: {state: string, score: float, previous: string, shift_date: date}
- signals: [{type: string, asset: string, direction: string, magnitude: string, source: string}]
- narratives: [{name: string, score: float, lifecycle: string}]
- calls: [{claim: string, timeframe: string, resolved: bool, outcome: string, actual: string}]
- scorecard: {accuracy: float, scored_at: datetime} (null if not yet scored)

## Update Cadence
- Briefs: 4x daily (06:30, 13:00, 17:00, 21:00 UTC)
- Scorecard: Updated nightly for briefs 48–72 hours old
- JSON Feed: Updated after each brief publication
- Sitemap: Regenerated daily at 00:00 UTC

## Historical Coverage
- Archive begins: February 23, 2026
- Growing daily — currently 68+ days of continuous coverage

## Contact
- Telegram: t.me/agentcanary
- API support: api@agentcanary.ai
- Site: https://agentcanary.ai
